articles.title: Hong Kong Government Workers Get 2% Pay Rise Starting April
articles.summary: Hong Kong's government has decided to give all civil servants a pay increase of 2% this year. The rise applies to workers across all grade levels and counts from 1st April 2026, meaning some staff will receive back pay. The announcement was made by the Secretary for the Civil Service on 9th June. Before the decision, unions had hoped for a bigger increase of between 3% and over 4%, saying that anything less than about 3.8% would actually mean workers were earning less in real terms because of rising prices. Around 170,000 civil servants are affected by this yearly pay adjustment, which is decided by the government after looking at private-sector salaries and the cost of living.

lv1: What percentage pay rise will Hong Kong civil servants receive this year? (香港公務員今年獲得多少百分比加薪？)
From which date does the 2% pay increase take effect? (2%加薪由哪個日期起生效？)
lv2: Why were the unions unhappy with the 2% pay rise, and what did they argue? (工會為何對2%加薪感到不滿，他們有何論據？)
How does the government decide how much to increase civil servants' pay each year? (政府每年如何決定公務員的加薪幅度？)
lv3: Do you think 2% is a fair pay rise for civil servants? Consider the cost of living and the government's budget when forming your view. (你認為2%加薪對公務員是否公平？請考慮生活費用和政府財政狀況來表達你的看法。)

Some people say that if public servants earn more, it puts pressure on government finances and could mean less money for public services like schools and hospitals. Do you agree? Why or why not? (有人認為若公務員薪酬過高，會對政府財政造成壓力，令學校和醫院等公共服務經費減少。你同意嗎？為什麼？)

articles.title: 香港天氣急變！明日氣溫急跌7度 未來九天持續有雨
articles.summary: 香港天文台預測，明日（6月10日）氣溫將大幅下降，最低可跌至攝氏23度，較今日急降約7度。未來九天，本港將持續受降雨天氣影響。週末期間，活躍的西南季候風加上高空擾動，將帶來大驟雨及雷暴，市民外出時須特別留意天氣變化，並隨身攜帶雨具，以防被突如其來的大雨淋濕。

lv1: 天文台預測明日最低氣溫是多少度？
未來幾天香港的天氣會怎樣？
lv2: 西南季候風是什麼？它為何會影響香港的天氣？
為何天文台要提前預報天氣？這對市民有什麼幫助？
lv3: 香港的極端天氣事件近年是否越來越頻繁？你認為這與氣候變化有關嗎？請說明你的理由。
如果你是香港政府官員，你會採取哪些措施幫助市民應對惡劣天氣？請提出至少兩個具體建議。

articles.adaptedFrom: WHO South-East Asia / World Environment Day 2026
articles.title: South-East Asia Is Hit Hardest by Climate Change — and Scientists Want Action Now
articles.summary: Every year, more people in South-East Asia die from the effects of climate change than in any other region in the world. Air pollution, heatwaves, floods, and diseases carried by insects are all getting worse. This year's World Environment Day, held on 5th June, carried the theme 'Climate Action', sending a clear message that talking about problems is no longer enough — countries must take real steps to fix them. Extreme weather events are damaging hospitals, roads, and food supplies, which makes it harder for people to stay healthy. Scientists and health experts are urging governments to build stronger health systems that can cope with a warming planet and reduce harmful carbon emissions at the same time.

lv1: Which region in the world has the most deaths caused by climate change each year? (全球哪個地區每年因氣候變化而死亡的人數最多？)
What was the theme of World Environment Day 2026? (2026年世界環境日的主題是什麼？)
lv2: Why does climate change make it harder for people to stay healthy? Give at least two reasons from the article. (為什麼氣候變化令人們更難保持健康？請從文章中列舉至少兩個原因。)
What does it mean to build a 'climate-resilient' health system, and why is this important? (建立「能抵禦氣候變化的」醫療系統是什麼意思，為何這很重要？)
lv3: World Environment Day says awareness is no longer enough and action is needed. Do you agree? What kind of actions do you think are most important — by governments, companies, or individuals? (世界環境日指出，光靠提高意識已經不足夠，必須採取行動。你同意嗎？你認為政府、企業或個人各自應採取哪些最重要的行動？)

Some people argue that poorer countries in South-East Asia should not have to cut carbon emissions because richer countries caused most of the pollution. Do you agree or disagree, and why? (有人認為東南亞較貧窮的國家不應被要求減少碳排放，因為大部分污染是由富裕國家造成的。你同意還是不同意？為什麼？)

articles.title: 內地車企面臨困境：銷量下跌、負債上升，出海或成出路
articles.summary: 內地汽車行業近期遇到雙重壓力——銷量持續下滑，同時企業負債亦不斷攀升，令業界風險明顯增加。分析師指出，各大車企為爭奪市場份額，投入了大量資金進行研發，令成本壓力大增。在國內市場競爭日趨激烈的情況下，不少企業開始積極向海外拓展業務，希望透過出口和在外國設廠來開闢新收入來源，以維持企業的可持續發展。

lv1: 內地車企目前面臨哪兩個主要問題？
lv2: 為什麼內地車企要花大量資金在研發上？這對企業有什麼影響？
車企選擇向海外擴展業務，對中國和目標國家各有什麼好處和壞處？
lv3: 如果你是一家內地汽車公司的行政總裁，你會如何應對銷量下跌和負債上升的雙重壓力？請提出具體策略。
有人認為內地車企「出海」會對其他國家的本土汽車工業構成威脅。你認為各國政府應如何回應？這是保護主義還是合理的自衛措施？
